name: Airtable
description: Create, read, update, and list records in Airtable bases
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Airtable API action to perform.

baseId.label: Base ID
baseId.description: Airtable base ID. Used by: all actions.

tableId.label: Table ID
tableId.description: Airtable table ID or name. Used by: all actions.

recordId.label: Record ID
recordId.description: Airtable record ID. Used by: Get Record, Update Record.

fields.label: Fields
fields.description: Record fields as key-value pairs. Used by: Create Record, Update Record.

filterFormula.label: Filter Formula
filterFormula.description: Airtable formula to filter records. Used by: List Records.

maxRecords.label: Max Records
maxRecords.description: Maximum number of records to return. Used by: List Records.
